pr.title: Record: 11L XSA-all + LeakyReLU(0.5)² + VR + GA (val_bpb=1.1164, pending 3-seed)

output.summary: Applies XSA on every layer with LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 plus Value Residual/Gated Attention and int6 quantization for compressed evaluation.
techniques: XSA on all 11 layers combined with Value Residual and Gated Attention gating
LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 activation with tuned warmdown across 7500 steps
Int6 per-row quantization with sliding-window evaluation
